name: Swissed Ham & Noodles Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart saucepan, melt the butter.
2. Saute the onion and green pepper until softened.
3. Remove from heat; stir in the soup and sour cream.
4. In a buttered 2-quart casserole, layer 1/3 of the noodles, 1/3 of the swiss cheese, 1/3 of the ham, and 1/2 of the soup mixture.
5. Repeat layers, ending with final 1/3 layer of noodles, cheese, and ham.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees for 30-45 minutes or until heated through.
